name: BRC Inc.
business: BRC Inc. is a Veteran-founded premium coffee and energy drink company operating through three primary channels: Wholesale, DTC, and Outposts. The company sells packaged coffee, ready-to-drink coffee, energy beverages, apparel, coffee brewing equipment, and lifestyle gear. It targets active-duty military, Veterans, first responders, and others who share its values.

exposures.sentence: Black Rifle Coffee Company is a Veteran-founded and led premium coffee, and energy drink, company operating through one reportable segment composed of three primary channels: Wholesale, DTC, and Outposts.
Our DTC platform has been the foundation of our business since the inception of the company and launch of www.blackriflecoffee.com.
Our DTC and Wholesale business success depends on third-party logistics and a network of brokers and distributors.
